metadata.record_policy: All real registry records are represented as project-major / institution-major / institution-category rows; search-only alias records are excluded.
metadata.critical_caveat: This JSON is for candidate discovery and similarity recommendation. It intentionally marks missing province plans, subject requirements, tuition, certificate, and ranking matches as unverified instead of guessing.

schema_notes.enrollment_by_province: Array of province-level plan facts. Empty means not present in local skill and must be fetched from provincial exam authorities or the school's 2026 admission plan.
schema_notes.gaokao_subject_requirements: Array by province. Empty means not present in local skill and must be checked before advising a candidate.
schema_notes.certificates: Parsed from local admission text when possible; CRS/admission-charter original text remains authoritative.
schema_notes.rankings: QS values are from local QS 2027 cache only when safe alias match exists. 软科 values are from local 2026 package cache and carry mapping/manual-review fields.

admissions.admission_plan_text_excerpt_from_local_i: 江西师范大学官网2026-06-17新闻显示，新西伯利亚数智学院为经教育部批准设立的非独立法人中外合作办学机构，依托人工智能学院和数学与统计学院，聚焦大数据、人工智能等领域，开展数学与应用数学、计算机科学与技术、人工智能三个专业本科学历教育，2026年秋季启动首届本科招生；公开报道口径显示各专业120人/年，3+1培养模式，最终以招生章程、培养方案和收费公示为准。
